chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Appl. No. S- 75 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.03.2025 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Muhammad Kaleemullah Memon, Advocate along with Applicant Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, A.P.G. In compliance of order passed earlier on 24.2.2025 minor baby Maham is present in Court with her mother. On query baby Maham states that she wants to live with her mother Mst. Nazia (Applicant). The father of baby Maham namely Majid Ali is also present in Court who has no contentions in this regard. In view of the above, the permanent custody of baby Maham Fatima whose age is about eight years and is a female gender is directed to be retained by Applicant Mst. Nazia (mother). It is settled law that where the welfare of the child lies is to be considered the most important aspect of such matters as held by Superior Courts. In view of above, this Cr. Misc. Application stands disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
